run_summary.summary: One new development since yesterday's scan: Kenny emailed Ian Saunders (Popfly) on Apr 24 apologizing for missing the Flexsteel application deadline and asking if it can be reopened — no reply from Ian yet. All four pending deals from yesterday remain unapplied and carry forward. Flexsteel updated to 'waiting on brand' now that Kenny has taken action. Wise Block launch window opens TOMORROW (Apr 25) — rate quote still unsent. Linkind SP6 content due Monday Apr 27. SOJOS approval follow-up is overdue. Separately: Liz is uploading ad creatives to Hawke Media's spreadsheet (their paid social agency) — unrelated to brand deals, no action needed.

suggestions.message: Kenny emailed Ian on Apr 24 admitting he missed the deadline and asking for another reopen — that's the right move. Now we wait. If Ian doesn't reply by EOD today, send a follow-up to ian@popfly.com. Keep it brief and warm since Ian has already been very flexible.

🚨 Launch window opens TOMORROW (Apr 25-30) and Liz still hasn't sent her rate to Iris (iris@makewondermcn.com). Get a quote out TODAY — even a ballpark keeps the door open. Offer: 1 YT/IG video, cash comp + free Botanical Series building block set (Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony).

⏰ SOJOS promised a 24-hour turnaround on revised content Liz sent Apr 23 — that window closed Apr 24 with no reply. Follow up with Ruby (marketing202@sojosvision.com): 'Hi Ruby! Just checking in — did you get a chance to review the updated video? Happy to make any final tweaks before we post!'

📹 Content due Monday Apr 27 (3 days). Key filming specs: nighttime lighting effects + app pattern controls = ~50% of video, voiceover must match visuals, lens in correct position. Liz said she'd try to deliver early — is it ready?

deals.next_action: Wait for Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com) to respond about reopening Popfly application — follow up if no reply by EOD Apr 25
deals.notes:
[Apr 24]: Kenny emailed Ian apologizing for missing the Popfly application deadline (missed due to post-Steinhafels chaos with kids). Asked Ian to reopen the application window again. Ian has not replied yet.
[Apr 23]: Ian Saunders (Popfly) reopened the Flexsteel/Steinhafels campaign application. Confirmed deadline was April 24 and asked Kenny to apply that day. Kenny replied he'd work on it after returning from Steinhafels — Ian 👍'd. Deadline passed without application submitted.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Kenny emailed Ian Saunders admitting the Popfly deadline was missed and requesting another reopen. Ball is in Ian's court.

deals.next_action: Send rate/quotation to Iris ASAP — Botanical Series launch window opens Apr 25-30
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Iris (Make Wonder MCN, Official Partner Agency for Wise Block) replied to Liz's follow-ups with a specific pitch for the Botanical Series (building blocks inspired by Eastern flora — Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony). Offering cash compensation + free product + Key Partner status. Deliverable: 1 YouTube or Instagram Video. Launch window: April 25-30. Sample delivery: 3-5 days after confirmation. Waiting on Liz's quotation to Iris (iris@makewondermcn.com).
deals.activity_note: Apr 25: Launch window opens — rate quote to Iris still unsent. Send quotation immediately to hold the opportunity.

deals.next_action: Film and deliver SP6 content — DUE Mon Apr 27 (nighttime lighting + app controls = ~50% of video, voiceover matching visuals)
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Agency (via misslizdidit@socialmediacollabs.com) requested content by Monday/Tuesday (Apr 27-28). Liz replied 'That works! I can try to get something to you sooner.' Key filming requirements: lighting portion ~50% of video, main focus on nighttime lighting effects, avoid turning lights on in daylight, show app controlling pattern changes (clear interface shots), lens in correct position, visuals and voiceover must match, follow agreed concept closely.
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Agency confirmed Mon/Tue deadline (Apr 27-28). Liz agreed and may deliver early. Key: nighttime lighting effects + app controls = 50% of video.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Ruby on content approval — 24-hr response window has elapsed, no reply received
deals.notes:
[Apr 23]: Liz sent revised IG Reel content to Ruby — added voiceover introducing SOJOS sunglasses and brand per Ruby's Apr 22 request. SOJOS said they respond within 24 hours. That window has now passed with no reply.
[Apr 22]: Liz submitted original video draft + caption to Ruby for approval. Ruby requested voiceover addition.
[Apr 20]: Ruby acknowledged draft was coming, provided IG Reel requirements (10+ sec, 50% close-ups, tag @sojosvision, hashtags #sojos #amazonsunglasses, code MISSLIZSOJOS).
[Apr 18]: Liz confirmed receipt of 4 pairs of SOJOS sunglasses. Draft deadline 4/23; 2nd video planned for May.
Caption used: 'The sunnies I'm rocking this season! Comment SUN for link! @sojosvision is my go to brand for sunglasses...code MISSLIZSOJOS.'
Compensation: product-only — 4 pairs of sunglasses + 10% off affiliate code. 2 deliverables total (1 IG Reel now + 1 video in May).
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Liz submitted revised SOJOS IG Reel with voiceover per Ruby's request. Awaiting approval — 24-hr window elapsed Apr 24 with no reply. Follow up today.
